message:
test(core): property-based tests for LRU cache arena invariants (wa-f2rf)

24 proptest properties with state-machine model checking:
- Reference model verification: real cache matches VecDeque-based model
  through arbitrary Put/Get/Peek/Remove/ContainsKey sequences
- Capacity bound: len() never exceeds capacity()
- No false negatives: all non-evicted keys retrievable
- Eviction ordering: always evicts the LRU item
- Recency promotion: get() and put(update) promote to MRU
- Peek non-promoting: peek() preserves recency order
- Stats consistency: hits+misses=lookups, all counters accurate
- Iterator consistency: MRU/LRU iterators are exact reverses
- Clear/reset: clear empties cache, reset_stats preserves data
- Resize: shrink evicts LRU entries, grow preserves all
- Free-list reuse: arena stays bounded under churn
- Retain predicate: only matching entries survive
- Pop LRU: drain produces entries in LRU order
- Edge cases: capacity-1, double put, remove nonexistent

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
